namespace TestApp.Mappers;

/// <summary>
/// Source generated mapper from <c>Employee</c> to <c>EmployeeModel</c>.
/// </summary>
partial class EmployeeMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Employee, global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Employee? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel
        {
            CompanyName = source.Department?.Company?.Name,
            CompanyCode = source.Department?.Company?.Code ?? string.Empty,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Employee source, global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.CompanyName = source.Department?.Company?.Name;
        destination.CompanyCode = source.Department?.Company?.Code ?? string.Empty;
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Employee, global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel
        {
            CompanyName = src.Department != null ? (src.Department.Company != null ? src.Department.Company.Name : null) : null,
            CompanyCode = src.Department != null ? (src.Department.Company != null ? src.Department.Company.Code : string.Empty) : string.Empty,
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.EmployeeModel> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Employee> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
